subject: You're in — welcome to Build OS26 🚀
vc_intent_note: Operational/logistics thread — Alessia Priolo is 'Deeptech Ecosystem Activator' at Mila Ventures, hosting the Build OS26 hackathon Pierre is currently participating in. This is NOT an investment dialogue thread. Mila Ventures relationship status: ecosystem partner via hackathon participation. For VC pitch prep, agent should surface: no direct investment conversation in Gmail history; entry point would be Alessia or via Mila Ventures investment partner cohort.

messages.body_verbatim:
Hi,

Congratulations — your team is in. Welcome to Build OS26.

Things are shaping up fast, and we're genuinely excited to have you in the room. One more piece of news to kick things off: our prize pool just grew to $45,000 — thanks to BDO Canada joining BCF and Telus as official event partners. Every dollar goes directly to the startups building at the frontier.

— WHAT YOU'RE WALKING INTO —

May 14 at Mila, Montreal. Your team shows up with a real startup problem, builds a working agentic system in five hours, and pitches it in front of a jury. No pre-built work. No audience seats — only builders at tables.

This is a startup competition. Your whole team competes together. The technical founder builds. The business founder shapes the problem and delivers the pitch. Both matter.

If you can do both roles - awesome. Solo Founders are welcome.

— ONE THING TO KNOW NOW —

You'll be submitting your project on event day through Oatmeal, our project submission platform. You'll receive the registration link in your next email (arriving ~May 8-11).

Oatmeal Registration Deadline: May 13 — don't leave this for the day of. Also plan some time next week to review the Build OS26 Terms & Conditions, they will be part of the Oatmeal onboarding process.

— KEY DATES —

Email #2 — Event Brief & Platform Onboarding | arriving ~May 8-11
Challenge context, tools to have ready, pitch format, prize structure, mentor lineup, and Oatmeal onboarding.

Email #3 — Final Logistics | arriving ~May 12
Full agenda, your prelim pitch room assignment, venue details, and everything you need to arrive ready.

Build OS26 — Ship or Fall Behind | Thursday, May 14 at Mila, Montreal
Recommended arrival: 8:15 AM - You need time to set up. Build window: 9:20 AM – 2:20 PM. Preliminary pitches: 2:30 PM. Grand Finale pitches: 4:00 PM – 5:00 PM. Ecosystem Networking Cocktail Starts at 5:00 PM. Winner Announcement – 5:30 PM

I'll be your main point of contact from here through May 14. Reply to this email directly for anything — questions, team changes, logistics.

See you on the build floor.

Alessia

--
Alessia Priolo
Deeptech Ecosystem Activator – Mila Ventures
